Astral Garment: Chaigidel  
Angel: Beelzebub-Yeled  

Personality Traits
Nibelcole are artificial Spirits created by Isaac Westcott using Beelzebub's power and DEM's Realizer technology. Each one identifies themselves as Westcott's “daughters” and is absolutely loyal to him. Their individual personalities are limited, and they are generally task-oriented and ruthless. However, they can sometimes exhibit childish behavior and have a weakness for sweets.

Abilities and Equipment
Angel: Beelzebub-Yeled

Cloning: They can replicate themselves through Beelzebub's pages. This ability gives them numerical superiority on the battlefield.

Papyrokinesis: They can manipulate paper to develop attack and defense techniques.

Helkivtut Armor: This armor made of paper increases Nibelcole's speed and strength, providing resistance against Kurumi's bullets and Shido's kisses.

Weakness: Due to Shido's feelings for Nia, Nibelcole can be sealed by his kiss and turn into paper, thereby disappearing.

Role in the Story
Nibelcoles are artificial Spirits created by Westcott using Beelzebub's power. They first appear during the Kurumi Refrain incident and fight against Kurumi's clones. Later, they play important roles in the Kurumi Ragnarok and Mio Game Over incidents. Thanks to their numerical superiority and ability to multiply, they are effective against many Spirits. However, Shido's feelings for Nia and his kiss are their greatest weakness.

Relationships
Allies

Isaac Ray Pelham Westcott: Their creator and master; they are absolutely loyal to him.

Ellen Mira Mathers: DEM's chief sorceress; she has worked alongside the Nibelcoles.

Artemisia Bell Ashcroft: DEM's Adeptus 2; she has worked in coordination with the Nibelcoles.

Enemies

Shido Itsuka: The only person who can seal the Nibelcoles.

Kurumi Tokisaki: Has fought against the Nibelcole clones.

Nia Honjo: The original owner of Beelzebub, the source of the Nibelcole's power.
34.name: Nibelcole

Ratatoskr – Vice President of Fraxinus

Former AST Captain

Personality Traits
Kyouhei Kannazuki serves as the vice president of Fraxinus. Although he is known for his dedication to his job and strategic intelligence, he attracts attention for his unusual tendencies in his personal life. In particular, his intense admiration for Commander Kotori Itsuka and his willingness to accept physical punishment from her have become a source of humor among the other members of the team. These behaviors clearly reveal his masochistic tendencies. However, despite these peculiarities, he maintains an extremely serious and professional attitude during missions.

Abilities and Equipment

Command Ability: Kannazuki possesses the ability to make critical decisions during Fraxinus's combat operations. He can manage multiple Realizers simultaneously and adapt quickly to changing conditions on the battlefield.

Realizer Usage: As a former AST captain, he can effectively use advanced Realizer technology. This ability gives him a significant advantage in battle.

Yggdrasil Integration: By working in harmony with Fraxinus' main systems, he can optimize the ship's defense and attack systems.

Role in the Story
Kannazuki serves as the deputy commander of Ratatoskr's airship Fraxinus, acting as Commander Kotori's right-hand man. He previously served as an AST captain and used unconventional methods to enforce discipline. For example, he punished subordinates who violated rules by making them wear cosplay outfits. After joining Ratatoskr, she is responsible for supporting Shido's interactions with the Spirits and managing operations. Her composure and strategic intelligence during battle have played a significant role in the team's success.

Relationships
Allies

Kotori Itsuka: His commander and the person he admires. His loyalty to her can sometimes overshadow his professionalism.

Reine Murasame: Fraxinus's analysis officer; they have worked together on many operations.

Fraxinus Team: Kannazuki coordinates with the other members of the team to ensure the success of operations.

Enemies

DEM Industries: The organization opposed to Ratatoskr; Kannazuki has developed strategies to thwart DEM's plans.

Isaac Ray Pelham Westcott: The leader of DEM; Kannazuki has organized various operations to disrupt his plans.

36.content:
Masaomi Mikimoto – Karakter Profili

Temel Bilgiler
Adı: Masaomi Mikimoto
Cinsiyet: Erkek
Yaş: 50+
Irk: İnsan
Boy: 178 cm
Göz Rengi: Siyah
Saç Rengi: Gri (kulak hizasında, alnına düşen bir tutam)
Ünvanlar:

Ratatoskr – Fraxinus Mürettebatı Üyesi

Takma Adı: "Boss"

Kişilik Özellikleri
Masaomi Mikimoto, Fraxinus mürettebatının en deneyimli üyelerinden biridir. Sakin, ağırbaşlı ve zarif bir tavra sahiptir. Genellikle elinde bir kadeh şarapla görülür ve bu, onun sofistike yaşam tarzını yansıtır. Mizahi bir yönü olsa da, görev sırasında son derece ciddidir ve stratejik düşünme yeteneğiyle tanınır. "Mahal kita" (Filipince "Seni seviyorum") ifadesini sıkça kullanması, onun romantik ve esprili kişiliğini ortaya koyar.

Yetenekler ve Ekipmanlar

Stratejik Zekâ: Mikimoto, savaş durumlarında hızlı ve etkili kararlar alabilme yeteneğine sahiptir.

İletişim Becerileri: Mürettebat üyeleri arasında uyumu sağlamak ve bilgi akışını yönetmek konusunda uzmandır.

Teknolojik Bilgi: Fraxinus'un sistemleri ve ekipmanları hakkında derinlemesine bilgiye sahiptir, bu da onu operasyonel görevlerde vazgeçilmez kılar.

Hikâye İçindeki Rolü
Mikimoto, Ratatoskr'un hava gemisi Fraxinus'un mürettebatı olarak, Shido'nun Spirit'lerle olan etkileşimlerini desteklemek ve operasyonları yönetmekle sorumludur. Deneyimi ve bilgeliği, mürettebatın moralini yüksek tutmada ve kriz anlarında soğukkanlılığını korumada önemli bir rol oynar. Shido'nun Spirit'lerle olan ilişkilerinde, Mikimoto'nun önerileri ve analizleri, başarılı sonuçlar elde edilmesine katkı sağlar.

İlişkiler
Müttefikler

Kotori Itsuka: Komutanı; Mikimoto, Kotori'nin liderliğine saygı duyar ve ona sadakatle bağlıdır.

Kyouhei Kannazuki: Başkan Yardımcısı; birlikte birçok operasyonda görev almışlardır.

Fraxinus Mürettebatı: Mikimoto, ekibin diğer üyeleriyle koordineli çalışarak operasyonların başarısını sağlar.

Düşmanlar

DEM Industries: Ratatoskr'un karşıtı olan organizasyon; Mikimoto, DEM'in planlarını engellemek için stratejiler geliştirmiştir.

Isaac Ray Pelham Westcott: DEM'in lideri; Mikimoto, onun planlarını bozmak için çeşitli operasyonlar düzenlemiştir.

Personality Traits
Munechika Nakatsugawa is one of the most energetic and passionate members of the Fraxinus crew. He is known for his deep interest in otaku culture and describes himself as “the man of 100 waifus.” His love for mecha series causes him to miss the ship during periods when Fraxinus is undergoing maintenance. Nakatsugawa, who was once known by the nickname “MUNECHIUKA,” recalls this period with embarrassment and feels uncomfortable when the nickname is mentioned. With his humorous and outgoing personality, he is a source of joy among the crew, but he is serious and responsible during missions.

Skills and Equipment

Strategic Contribution: He plays an active role in Shido's interactions with the Spirits and in decisions made by the crew through unanimous agreement.

Otaku Knowledge: His deep knowledge of otaku culture has been particularly useful in operations related to Nia.

Past Doujin Experience: As a representative of the legendary doujin group “Mai MaiKaburi” in the past, he has experience in gaining popularity.

Role in the Story
As a member of the crew of Ratatoskr's airship Fraxinus, Nakatsugawa is responsible for supporting Shido's interactions with the Spirits and managing operations. In the past, as a representative of the legendary doujin group “Mai MaiKaburi,” he gained experience in gaining popularity. However, five years ago, the group disbanded due to a disagreement over how to address a character named “Lispy Little Sister.” After this incident, she has not participated in Comico events. In Shido's interactions with Nia, she has made significant contributions with her doujin experience and otaku knowledge.

Allies

Kyouji Kawagoe is one of the most notable members of the Fraxinus crew. Having been married and divorced five times, he has earned the title of “Master of Love.” This history does not reflect his inexperience in romantic relationships, but rather his passion and determination in his interactions with women. Social Observation: His experience in human relationships is beneficial in Shido's romantic interactions.

As a member of the crew of Ratatoskr's airship Fraxinus, Kawagoe is responsible for supporting Shido's interactions with the Spirits and managing operations. During missions, he contributes to strategic decision-making by voting on Shido's interactions with the Spirits he encounters. His humorous personality keeps the crew's morale high, but he adopts a serious and disciplined attitude when necessary. His past marriage experiences have deepened his observations of romantic relationships, which prove beneficial to Shido's missions.

Reine Murasame – Character Profile

Titles:

Ratatoskr – Fraxinus Chief Analyst

Raizen High School Physics Teacher

“Phantom” (Mysterious Being)

“Creator of Spirits”

Personality Traits
Reine Murasame has a calm, logical, and analytical personality. She is often seen tired and sleep-deprived; she has stated that she has not been able to sleep for 30 years. This condition is a result of traumatic events she experienced in the past. Although Reine appears emotionally distant, she harbors deep compassion for Shido and the other Spirits. Especially when guiding Shido, she acts on her maternal instincts. She is kind and understanding in her relationships with her students and crew.

Abilities and Equipment

Spirit Creation: Reine has the ability to transform humans into Spirits. She uses Sephira Crystals in this process.

Reality Manipulation: She has the ability to bend reality and control time and space.

Omnipotence: As a being that transcends all powers, she has access to unlimited power and knowledge.

Astral Dress: Similar to Mio Takamiya's Astral Dress, she wears a semi-transparent dress resembling water droplets. This dress is adorned with floral and gold decorations.

Phantom Form: When she appears in her Phantom identity, her appearance and voice are perceived as mosaic-like, thus keeping her identity hidden.

Role in the Story
Reine initially serves as the chief analyst on Ratatoskr's Fraxinus ship and directs Shido's interactions with the Spirits. She also works as a physics teacher at Raizen High School. However, her true identity is later revealed: She is the mysterious entity known as Phantom and played a key role in the creation of the Spirits. Reine's true goal is to revive her deceased lover, Shinji Takamiya. To achieve this objective, she has transformed humans into Spirits and collected the Sephira Crystals. Ultimately, she aims to reunite with Shinji in the afterlife by causing Shido to kill her.

Relationships
Allies

Shido Itsuka: Reine guides Shido and forms a deep bond with him.

Kotori Itsuka: Commander; Reine respects Kotori's leadership and is loyally devoted to her.

Fraxinus Crew: Reine coordinates with the other members of the team to ensure the success of operations.

Spirits: Tohka Yatogami, Yoshino, Kurumi Tokisaki, Miku Izayoi, Origami Tobiichi, Kaguya and Yuzuru Yamai, Natsumi, Nia Honjou, Mukuro Hoshimiya.

Enemies

Isaac Ray Pelham Westcott: Leader of DEM Industries; Reine has organized various operations to thwart his plans.

Ellen Mira Mathers: DEM's chief sorceress; Reine has engaged in various conflicts with her.

DEM Industries – Former Battle Wizard

Ratatoskr – Member

Mana is known as a cool-headed and effective soldier during missions. However, he harbors a deep love and protective instinct toward Shido. His loyalty to his family can override orders. Like Kotori, he may act impulsively to help others. He prefers athletic attire and has an interest in martial arts.

CR-Unit Usage: He skillfully uses the battle armor developed by DEM.

Combat Skills: He possesses advanced skills in close combat and weapon use.  

Military Training: His strategic thinking and leadership skills have been developed through training at DEM and AST.  

Genetic Modification: His body has been enhanced through experiments conducted by DEM, but this has shortened his lifespan.  

Role in the Story
Mana was raised by DEM Industries and served in AST. During her mission, she encounters Shido without knowing he is her brother. She is severely injured in her battle with Kurumi Tokisaki and is treated by Ratatoskr. During this process, she learns the truth about her past and leaves DEM to join Ratatoskr. She fights against her former comrades to protect Shido.

Family

Shido Itsuka: Her brother; the bond between them is revealed in later parts of the story.

Allies

Ellen Mira Mathers: DEM's chief sorceress; she has engaged in various conflicts with Mana.

Kurumi Tokisaki: Initially seen as an enemy, but their relationship becomes complicated over time.

key: The Origin and Birth Process of Spirits.
41.content:
The Origin and Birth Process of Spirits:

Spirits are not beings from another world or dimension; on the contrary, they are beings derived from humans within this world. However, their birth did not occur directly through human will. In the beginning, there was only one Spirit: Mio Takamiya, known as the “Spirit of Origin.”

Spirit of Origin – Mio Takamiya:

Mio Takamiya was the first being in the world to condense meaning and transform into a superhuman form. Her existence caused a major space-time distortion and the first great dimensional quake (Spatial Quake). This event went down in modern history as the first major Spirit incident. Mio could not balance the absolute power she carried on her own, so she broke off pieces of her essence to create crystals: the Sephira Crystals.

The Birth of the Spirits:

The Sephira Crystals are concentrated, pure forms of Spirit energy. Mio gave these crystals to some people—intentionally or accidentally—and these individuals were transformed into Spirits by the crystal's influence. Characters such as Tohka Yatogami, Kurumi Tokisaki, Yoshino, Kotori Itsuka, Origami Tobiichi, Natsumi, Nia Honjo, Mukuro Hoshimiya, and Mayuri are beings who became Spirits directly through this process.

Each Spirit's transformation process took place on different emotional grounds: sometimes fear, sometimes loneliness, sometimes longing. These different emotions determined their Astral Dress (armor) and Angel (weapon) forms and natures.

Inverse Transformation and Qlipha Crystals:

When the mana carried within Spirits is corrupted by negative emotions, the Sephira Crystals begin to darken. As a result of this darkening process, Spirits transition into their Inverse (reverse) form. In the Inverse form, the Sephira Crystal is replaced by the Qlipha Crystal. This results in the Spirit losing its mental and emotional stability; its powers increase, but its behavior becomes completely destructive.

 
  
Inverse forms are usually triggered by extreme trauma, betrayal, or despair. Spirits in this form possess a dark version of Angels called “Demon Kings.”

Connections Between Spirits:

Each Spirit carries a piece of Mio Takamiya's essence. Therefore, a direct energy flow or resonance can be felt between Spirits. Unconscious bonds may arise between some Spirits due to the similarity of their origins. The internal struggle between Tohka and Inverse Tohka is one of the most prominent examples of this bond.

42.content:
Shido Itsuka – True Power Profile

Basic Information
Shido Itsuka is the only human in the Date A Live universe who can seal Spirit power. However, this ability is not a gift given to an ordinary human. Shido, whose real name is Shinji Takamiya, was killed and brought back to life by Mio Takamiya, the Spirit of Origin. This event has made him a unique hybrid being with both human and Spirit qualities.

Sealing Ability
Shido's true power is his ability to seal the power of Spirits. He does this by forming an emotional bond with a Spirit and kissing it. Sealing the power is only possible if the Spirit itself wants the process to happen. Once the sealing process is complete, most of the Spirit's power is transferred to Shido, and the Spirit's destructive nature is suppressed.

Angel Usage
Shido can use the power-representing weapons of the Spirits he has sealed, known as “Angels.” These powers accumulate passively within him, and over time, he can actively summon and use them. For example, Tohka's Sandalphon, Yoshino's Zadkiel, and Kotori's Camael are among the Angels that Shido can summon. When using these powers, he can also mimic the techniques of the Spirits.

Resistance to Spirit Powers
He has an innate resistance to the powers of the Spirits he seals. For example, effects such as Kurumi's time manipulation abilities or Nia's prophecy power may be weak or ineffective on Shido. This gives him a unique advantage in his interactions with Spirits.

Combination of Spirit Powers
As the number of Spirits he seals increases over time, Shido's spiritual structure begins to function like a core composed of different powers. Each power he seals grants him different abilities and forms of defense. This makes him one of the most powerful beings in the universe. However, maintaining all these powers together requires serious spiritual balance.

 
  
Risk of Internal Destruction
As the number of sealed powers increases, Shido's body and soul begin to feel the pressure of this burden. If his spiritual balance is disrupted, the sealed powers may leak out uncontrollably. This turns him into a threat to his surroundings. In the later episodes of the series, carrying these powers becomes a struggle for Shido, both physically and emotionally.

Connection to the Spirit of Origin
The source of Shido's true power is Mio Takamiya, the Spirit of Origin. When Mio grants him this power, she also makes his existence an element that will maintain the balance of the Spirits. Shido's birth and powers are so important that they could change the direction of the Spirits in the universe.

Total Power Potential
Shido's power is not fixed, as it carries the characteristics of each Spirit he seals. However, as the number of sealed Spirits increases, these powers make him a unique being in terms of both quantity and variety. According to Kurumi, Shido could potentially reach the level of a “divine being” if he seals all the Spirits.

Conclusion
Shido Itsuka is not technically a Spirit. However, considering the power he possesses, the abilities he uses, and the number of beings he has sealed, he is far beyond an ordinary human. This power, which possesses both unifying and destructive potential, is of such magnitude that it will directly influence the fate of the Date A Live universe.
42.name: Shido Itsuka – True Power Profile

43.content:
The Secret of Takamiya

Shido Itsuka's past is much more complicated than that of an ordinary person. In fact, Shido's birth name is Shinji Takamiya, and his birth is linked to one of the deepest secrets of the Spirit universe. This secret is the fundamental element that explains both his existence and the source of his power.

His Connection to Mio Takamiya

Years ago, Mio Takamiya, known as the Spirit of Origin, appeared in the human world for unknown reasons. During this time, she encountered the young Shinji Takamiya. Shinji helped Mio, protected her in the human world, and offered her an emotional connection. A deep bond developed between the two.

However, this bond ended tragically. When Mio lost Shinji, she revived him using her own power. As a result of this action, Shinji's soul fused with Spirit energy. Mio brought him back to life—this time as “Shido Itsuka.” During this rebirth, Shido was given the ability to seal Spirit powers into his body. This power comes solely from the divine-level Spirit energy directly given by Mio.

Shido's Ability to Seal Spirit Power

Shido can hold the Angels and certain special abilities of the Spirits he seals within his own body. What allows him to control this power is spiritual balance and the essence from Mio. If this balance is disrupted, Shido's soul may shatter, and the sealed powers may be released uncontrollably.

Human or Spirit?

Takamiya's secret lies here: although Shido is physically human, he is spiritually a Spirit. Therefore, he is a being that cannot be measured by conventional methods. His existence has the potential to change the position of Spirits in the universe. This explains why both DEM Industries and powerful beings such as Kurumi Tokisaki are so insistent on monitoring him.

Conclusion

The secret of Takamiya lies in the fact that Shido is a Spirit-origin entity inhabiting a human body. This secret is the central truth that explains both his nature and his deep connection to Spirits. The life and power bestowed upon him by Mio Takamiya are significant enough to potentially disrupt the entire balance of the Date A Live universe.

key: Date A Bullet Universe – Kurumi-centered Alternate World
44.content:
Date A Bullet Universe – Kurumi-Centered Alternative World
Origin of the Series

Date A Bullet is not a direct continuation of the original Date A Live series, but rather a spin-off light novel series. It follows Kurumi Tokisaki's death and her clone form in a different dimension called the “Neighboring World.”

Written by Yuichiro Higashide, it was developed under the supervision of the original series author Kōshi Tachibana and has become an eight-volume series since 2017. It was later adapted into two anime films (Dead or Bullet & Nightmare or Queen).

Plot & Starting Point

The novels and films focus on Kurumi's consciousness and body after her death, which are taken over by a clone version of herself. This version steals some memories from Hibiki Higoromo, who has suffered memory loss, and reshapes herself under the identity of “Empty.”

After regaining her true identity, Kurumi decides to find her way to this neighboring world in order to reunite with Shido Itsuka. To achieve this goal, she travels to various regions (such as Keter, Binah, Hod, Netzach, and Yesod). Each region has its own unique cultural characteristics and challenges.

Factions and Characters

In this universe, instead of Spirits, there are semi-spiritual beings called “Quasi-Spirits.” These are generally female and aim to survive through deadly battles.

There is a version known as “White Kurumi” that is under the control of the Binah region; this version reflects the consciousness of Kurumi's childhood friend.

Kurumi is both combative and strategic in this universe; she adapts to different regions by taking on various forms, such as identity changes, cosplay, and idol appearances.

Core Themes and Structure

Kurumi participates in deadly tournaments similar to “battle royale” in this universe. The winner gains the right to make a wish and the possibility of returning. These battles are a combination of romance, action, strategy, and betrayal.

The primary goal is to reunite with Shido and simultaneously find a way out of this strange world.

Each volume or film focuses on Kurumi's adventures in a particular region: she encounters new Quasi-Spirits, new enemies, and contrasting personality variants (e.g., detective cosplay, bunny costume restaurant worker, etc.).

In terms of character development, Kurumi's motivations expand and mature, and new power variants become effective in the trailers.

key: Inverse Spirits – Dark Forms of Spirits
45.content:
Inverse Spirits – Dark Forms of Spirits
Definition and Origin
Inverse Spirits, also known as “Demon Kings,” are distorted and more destructive versions of normal Spirits. This form is triggered when a Spirit remains under intense negative emotions—usually fear, despair, or deep pain—for a long period of time. The Inverse form is a destructive inner nature that emerges as a result of a spiritual explosion and is difficult to control.

This state manifests itself when the classic Astral Dress and Angel weapons are replaced by darker and more powerful Demon King weapons (Angel replicas powered by Qliphah Crystals). These weapons work more directly to inflict physical damage on the Spirit's emotional breaking points.

Features and Abilities
Predatory Power: In this form, Spirit can create large Spatial Quakes at will; physical interventions are nearly ineffective. The Inverse form possesses the power to disrupt the general stability of time and space. 
villains.fandom.com
date-a-live.fandom.com

Demon King Weapons: Angels, normally supported by the Sephirah Crystal, undergo a transformation using Qliphah Crystals, becoming more deadly and capable of sudden attacks. 
date-a-live.fandom.com

Emotional and Mental Collapse: The Spirit loses a significant portion of its ability to behave in a controlled manner. Its behavior includes aggressive, inconsistent outbursts of anger. For this reason, the Inverse form typically attacks anyone in its path.

Example Characters
Tohka Yatogami
The first observed example of an Inverse Spirit.

It was triggered when Ellen Mathers saw Shido about to be killed.

Inverse Tohka acted solely with a focus on death and destruction; everyone, including Shido, became a target.

Although she returned to her classic form, her memory of the process was erased. 
villains.fandom.com
date-a-live.fandom.com
animecorner.me

Nia Honjo
Nia, who naturally possesses the power of prophecy, can use this information for “sharp piercing attacks” when she loses control.

In a state of spiritual collapse, she attacks with intense anger.

Origami Tobiichi and Others
It has been observed that Origami, in her Inverse form, harms herself and carries out uncontrollable attacks.

It is known that other Spirits can also transform into Inverse forms, but this state is rarely seen.

Triggering Factors
Inverse transformation is usually the result of several events:

Failures in sealing Shido's power,

the Spirit feeling betrayed or abandoned,

and serious mental breakdowns (fear of loss, helplessness, intense anger).

These situations cause a rupture in the Spirit's spiritual energy, triggering the Inverse form.

Reversing the Form
Inverse Spirits can be reversed back to their normal Spirit state. The only factor that enables this is Shido's “sealing” action.
As in the case of Tohka, Shido's sealing through a kiss both rewinds the energy in an orderly manner and restores spiritual balance. This method makes it possible to transition the Inverse state into a controllable normal form.
